name: tickdb-market-data
tagline: ClawHub (139★): TickDB 统一实时行情数据 API。覆盖外汇、贵金属、指数、美股、港股、A股、加密货币，提供实时行情、K线、订单簿、资金流向、股票基本面等数据查询。 当用户提及价格、行情、K线、买卖盘、市值、市盈率、资金流向、分时走势、交易日历等金融数据相关
verdict: Its own numbers disagree with each other: one section states a product-count breakdown that doesn't add up to the 37,527+ figure repeated elsewhere, so you can't trust the data at face value. Also dumps a 480-line raw API reference inline. Hygiene and structure are otherwise solid.

highlights.summary: Contradicts the total product count stated repeatedly elsewhere (line 69 '37,527+ 产品', line 102 breakdown summing to 37,527, lines 760/768/769/770 '37,527+ 产品覆盖 6 大市场') — one secti
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in description or body despite the skill covering a broad multi-market domain where misfire on non-da
The ~480-line endpoint reference section (parameter tables, return-field tables, example curl/JSON per endpoint, clearly delimited by '---' and '##' per-endpoint headers) is bulk m
